svg.title: HyperWeave — Where Vectors Meet Vision
svg.desc: V11 Cobalt Sapphire Formidable. Graph-theoretic construction with deep sapphire light flow — refracted luminance channels along edges, caustic vertex accumulation, crystal-interior glow. Transparent substrate. Adaptive light/dark typography. Enlarged type balanced 50/50 with glyph. Formidable severity.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Formidable brand banner with sapphire crystal light flow. The geometry is a precision instrument, not decoration. Light moves THROUGH the structure like a sapphire diffracting incident photons — accumulating at vertices (caustics), channeling along edges (waveguides), and refracting through face planes.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Layout: 50/50 visual weight balance. Glyph at x=230 (19.2%) with scale 1.85 = 296px visual diameter. Typography at 94px bold italic = ~560px wide. Text anchor x=470. Gap: 44px (3.7%). Transparent substrate with full CSS custom property system for light/dark adaptive text. Formidable severity: condensed mono for secondary type, uppercase tracking, surgical accent color.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Transparent background means glyph must carry its own luminance — filter chain is heavier (3-tier glow) to ensure self-luminous presence on any surface. Text adaptive system adds CSS complexity but guarantees readability on both light and dark substrates. Typography at 94px risks overwhelming glyph — compensated by increased glyph scale (1.85) and deeper glow radius. Face fills added at 0.05 opacity as sapphire crystal interior planes — technically breaks pure wireframe but essential for light-refraction illusion.
hw:reasoning.hw:spatial-notes: Glyph center (230,210) = 19.2%×50%. Glyph visual extent: 82-378px horizontal (296px). Text block: 470-1080px (610px). Vertical: title y=232 (55.2%), tagline y=276 (65.7%), lab y=306 (72.9%). Typography cascade: 94→13→10.5px with 44px/30px steps. Negative space: left margin 82px (6.8%), right margin 120px (10%), glyph-text gap 44px (3.7%). Aspect 20:7.
